title: man-db bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.12.0-10]
- Fix patch to increase MAX_NAME to 16384
- Resolves: RHEL-93654

[2.12.0-9]
- Increase MAX_NAME to 16384
- Resolves: RHEL-93654
